title_zh: AI 資本支出回本雷達
method_en: Tracks the four hyperscalers (Alphabet · Meta · Microsoft · Amazon) plus the two frontier labs (OpenAI · Anthropic) on one question: is the AI capex paying off yet — who is converting spend into revenue, and who is just burning? 'AI capex' and 'AI revenue' are NOT reported line items, so the board mixes hard numbers with flagged estimates. Total capex & revenue are LIVE from yfinance (cash-flow statement + income statement, TTM). The AI share of capex is a management-GUIDED estimate. Cloud segment revenue (Azure / Google Cloud / AWS) is the REPORTED hard floor; an AI-only revenue band sits beside it as OUR_EST. For the private labs there are no filings — revenue run-rate, burn, funding and compute commitments are fragmentary news/our-estimates, clearly tagged and directional only. Per company: an AI-capex coverage ratio (AI revenue ÷ AI spend), a 0–100 payback score and a verdict (MONETIZING / INVESTING / BURNING). The circularity ledger flags AI dollars looping between the same names. Seed values render the board offline.
method_zh: 用一個問題追蹤四大雲端巨頭(Alphabet · Meta · 微軟 · Amazon)加兩家前沿實驗室(OpenAI · Anthropic):AI 資本支出回本了沒 — 誰把投入轉成營收、誰只是在燒?「AI capex」與「AI 營收」皆非財報科目,故本看板硬數據與標記估計值並陳。總 capex 與總營收為 yfinance 即時值(現金流量表 + 損益表,TTM)。capex 中的 AI 佔比為管理層口徑(GUIDED)。雲端分部營收(Azure / Google Cloud / AWS)為 REPORTED 硬底;旁邊並列一條 AI-only 營收估計帶(OUR_EST)。私有實驗室無財報 — 營收 run-rate、年燒錢、募資與算力承諾皆為零碎新聞/本平台估計,明確標記、僅供方向參考。每家計算:AI 資本支出覆蓋率(AI 營收 ÷ AI 投入)、0–100 回本分數與結論(MONETIZING / INVESTING / BURNING)。循環性帳本標記在同一群名字之間轉圈的 AI 資金。種子值讓看板可離線渲染。

headline.verdict_en: BURNING — spend far ahead of AI revenue
headline.verdict_zh: BURNING — 投入遠超 AI 營收

headline.verdict_en: BURNING — spend far ahead of AI revenue
headline.verdict_zh: BURNING — 投入遠超 AI 營收

ai_capex_share.source_en: Mgmt: most of capex is servers & data centers for AI/Cloud (10-Q + calls)
ai_capex_share.source_zh: 管理層:多數 capex 為 AI/Cloud 的伺服器與資料中心(10-Q + 法說)

ai_rev_band.basis_en: Gemini API + Vertex AI + AI-attributed Cloud uplift; ad AI uplift excluded (un-isolable).
ai_rev_band.basis_zh: Gemini API + Vertex AI + AI 可歸因的 Cloud 增量;廣告 AI 增益未計(無法隔離)。

companies.verdict_en: INVESTING — heavy build, revenue ramping behind
companies.verdict_zh: INVESTING — 重壓建置,營收在後爬升

mgmt_quote.en: AI is driving Cloud growth and backlog; we are capacity-constrained and raising capex to meet demand.
mgmt_quote.zh: AI 正在帶動 Cloud 成長與在手訂單;我們產能受限,正提高 capex 以滿足需求。

companies.note_en: Cloud is the fastest-growing big segment; AI demand shows up as Cloud backlog. Capex high but revenue base huge → intensity moderate.
companies.note_zh: Cloud 是成長最快的大分部;AI 需求以 Cloud 在手訂單呈現。capex 高但營收基數龐大 → 強度中等。

ai_capex_share.source_en: Mgmt: capex tied to Azure AI demand; ~half finance leases for AI (10-Q + calls)
ai_capex_share.source_zh: 管理層:capex 綁定 Azure AI 需求;約半數為 AI 融資租賃(10-Q + 法說)

ai_rev_band.basis_en: Azure AI services run-rate + Copilot (M365/GitHub) seats; mgmt has guided an AI run-rate crossing ~$13B.
ai_rev_band.basis_zh: Azure AI 服務 run-rate + Copilot(M365/GitHub)席次;管理層曾口徑 AI run-rate 突破約 $13B。

companies.verdict_en: INVESTING — heavy build, revenue ramping behind
companies.verdict_zh: INVESTING — 重壓建置,營收在後爬升

mgmt_quote.en: Our AI business surpassed a multi-billion annual run-rate; Azure AI demand exceeds capacity into next year.
mgmt_quote.zh: 我們的 AI 業務已突破數十億美元年化 run-rate;Azure AI 需求到明年都超過產能。

companies.note_en: Highest capex acceleration of the four; Microsoft Cloud margin is rich, but AI-only revenue is still a fraction of AI capex.
companies.note_zh: 四家中 capex 加速最猛;微軟雲毛利豐厚,但 AI-only 營收仍只是 AI capex 的一小部分。

ai_capex_share.source_en: Mgmt: majority of capex is AWS infrastructure, driven by AI/GenAI (10-Q + calls)
ai_capex_share.source_zh: 管理層:多數 capex 為 AWS 基礎建設,由 AI/生成式 AI 驅動(10-Q + 法說)

ai_rev_band.basis_en: AWS AI/ML services (Bedrock, Trainium/Inferentia, SageMaker) run-rate; mgmt calls AI a multi-billion, triple-digit-growth business.
ai_rev_band.basis_zh: AWS AI/ML 服務(Bedrock、Trainium/Inferentia、SageMaker)run-rate;管理層稱 AI 為數十億美元、三位數成長的業務。

companies.verdict_en: INVESTING — heavy build, revenue ramping behind
companies.verdict_zh: INVESTING — 重壓建置,營收在後爬升

mgmt_quote.en: AWS AI is a multi-billion-dollar business growing triple digits; we'd grow faster if we had more capacity.
mgmt_quote.zh: AWS 的 AI 是一門數十億美元、三位數成長的業務;若有更多產能,我們會成長更快。

companies.note_en: Largest absolute capex; AWS growth slower than Google Cloud but the revenue base (whole company) is enormous → low capex intensity.
companies.note_zh: 絕對 capex 最大;AWS 成長慢於 Google Cloud,但營收基數(整家公司)龐大 → capex 強度低。

ai_capex_share.source_en: Mgmt: capex dominated by AI infra (training + recommendation/ads inference) (10-Q + calls)
ai_capex_share.source_zh: 管理層:capex 以 AI 基礎建設為主(訓練 + 推薦/廣告推論)(10-Q + 法說)

cloud.source_en: Family of Apps ad revenue (10-Q) — no cloud business; AI monetizes via ad efficiency
cloud.source_zh: Family of Apps 廣告營收(10-Q)— 無雲端業務;AI 透過廣告效率變現

ai_rev_band.basis_en: Meta sells no AI product directly — AI shows up as ad-targeting & engagement uplift, NOT a clean line. Band is intentionally wide; treat as directional.
ai_rev_band.basis_zh: Meta 不直接賣 AI 產品 — AI 體現為廣告投放與互動的增益,非乾淨科目。此帶刻意拉寬,僅供方向參考。

companies.verdict_en: MONETIZING — AI revenue covering the spend
companies.verdict_zh: MONETIZING — AI 營收正在覆蓋投入

mgmt_quote.en: AI is improving ad performance and engagement today; the bigger bets (AGI, Llama) are multi-year and not yet monetized directly.
mgmt_quote.zh: AI 今天已在改善廣告成效與互動;更大的賭注(AGI、Llama)是多年期,尚未直接變現。

companies.note_en: Only one of the four with no cloud to sell compute — AI capex must pay back through ad efficiency, the hardest to isolate. Highest capex intensity, fastest capex acceleration.
companies.note_zh: 四家中唯一沒有雲端可賣算力 — AI capex 必須透過廣告效率回本,最難隔離。capex 強度最高、加速最快。

revenue_yoy.source_zh: 由前一年 run-rate 推算

annual_burn.source_en: Est. cash burn incl. compute & training
annual_burn.source_zh: 估計現金燒錢(含算力與訓練)

funding_raised.source_en: Cumulative equity raised (incl. Microsoft & later rounds)
funding_raised.source_zh: 累計募資(含微軟與後續輪)

compute_commitment.source_zh: 多年期算力承諾(微軟/Oracle/其他)

private.verdict_en: INVESTING — heavy build, revenue ramping behind
private.verdict_zh: INVESTING — 重壓建置,營收在後爬升

mgmt_quote.en: Revenue is growing fast but we are spending far more than we earn to scale compute; profitability is years out.
mgmt_quote.zh: 營收快速成長,但我們為了擴張算力,花的遠多於賺的;獲利還要很多年。

private.note_en: No filings — every figure here is fragmentary press/our-estimate, directional only. Massive compute commitments are the headline risk.
private.note_zh: 無財報 — 此處每個數字皆為零碎新聞/本平台估計,僅供方向參考。龐大算力承諾是最大風險。

revenue_yoy.source_zh: 由前一年 run-rate 推算(快速爬升)

annual_burn.source_en: Est. cash burn incl. compute & training
annual_burn.source_zh: 估計現金燒錢(含算力與訓練)

funding_raised.source_zh: 累計募資(含 Amazon 與 Google)

compute_commitment.source_zh: 多年期算力承諾(Amazon/Google 雲)

private.verdict_en: INVESTING — heavy build, revenue ramping behind
private.verdict_zh: INVESTING — 重壓建置,營收在後爬升

mgmt_quote.en: Enterprise/API revenue is compounding faster than OpenAI's early curve, but burn is large and compute-bound; funded by Amazon & Google.
mgmt_quote.zh: 企業/API 營收的複合成長快於 OpenAI 早期曲線,但燒錢大且受算力綁定;由 Amazon 與 Google 出資。

private.note_en: Faster revenue compounding and a leaner burn than OpenAI on these estimates, but the same compute-commitment dependency on its two cloud backers.
private.note_zh: 依這些估計,營收複合成長快於 OpenAI、燒錢較精實,但同樣對兩家雲端金主有算力承諾依賴。

edges.what_en: Nvidia investment/commitment tied to OpenAI buildout
edges.what_zh: Nvidia 對 OpenAI 建置的投資/承諾
OpenAI 多年期算力採購承諾
微軟對 OpenAI 的累計投資

edges.what_en: Amazon investment in Anthropic (cloud credits + equity)
edges.what_zh: Amazon 對 Anthropic 的投資(雲端額度 + 股權)
Google 對 Anthropic 的投資

edges.what_en: GPU purchases route compute dollars back to Nvidia — closing the loop
edges.what_zh: GPU 採購把算力支出送回 Nvidia — 閉合循環

alerts.en: AI spend far ahead of AI revenue: across the four, AI capex ≈ $254.8B/yr vs AI-only revenue ≈ $56.5B (coverage 0.222). Still an investment phase, not a payback one.
alerts.zh: AI 投入遠超 AI 營收:四家合計 AI capex ≈ $254.8B/年 vs AI-only 營收 ≈ $56.5B(覆蓋率 0.222)。仍在投入期,非回本期。

alerts.en: Fastest converter: Meta (score 61.9, cloud +18.0%). Heaviest builder: Alphabet (Google) (score 50.8, capex intensity 26.0%).
alerts.zh: 變現最快:Meta(分數 61.9,雲端 +18.0%)。投入最重:Alphabet(Google)(分數 50.8,capex 強度 26.0%)。

alerts.en: Capex outrunning revenue: Alphabet (Google) capex +107.4%/yr vs revenue +21.8%/yr — the depreciation tail will land on margins before the AI revenue does.
alerts.zh: capex 跑贏營收:Alphabet(Google) capex +107.4%/年 vs 營收 +21.8%/年 — 折舊尾巴會比 AI 營收更早壓上毛利。

alerts.en: Circularity flag: ≈ $424.0B in tracked commitments loops between Nvidia, the labs and the clouds — some 'AI revenue' is the same dollars circulating, not independent end-demand.
alerts.zh: 循環性警示:約 $424.0B 的追蹤承諾在 Nvidia、實驗室與雲端之間轉圈 — 部分「AI 營收」是同一批資金循環,非獨立終端需求。

payback_read.en: No — not yet. Across the four, AI capex of ~$255B/yr dwarfs the ~$56.5B AI-only revenue, an aggregate coverage of 0.22. That is an investment phase, not payback. Cloud as a whole earns its keep (coverage 1.15), but the AI-specific layer is deeply underwater. Meta converts fastest (score 61.9) because its AI spend feeds ad-engagement revenue rather than rented GPUs. Alphabet is the heaviest builder — capex intensity 26%, capex growing ~107%/yr vs revenue ~22%. Microsoft and Amazon sit mid-pack at coverage ~0.28 and ~0.17. The depreciation tail hits margins before the AI revenue arrives.
payback_read.zh: 還沒。四家合計AI資本支出約2550億美元，遠超約565億的純AI營收，整體覆蓋率僅0.22，仍屬投資期而非回收期。雲端整體能自負盈虧（覆蓋1.15），但AI專屬層虧損嚴重。Meta轉換最快（評分61.9），因其AI支出餵養廣告互動營收而非租用GPU。Alphabet建設最重——資本強度26%，資本支出年增約107%對營收約22%。微軟、亞馬遜居中，覆蓋率約0.28與0.17。折舊尾巴會在AI營收到來前先壓縮利潤。

circularity_read.en: About $424B of tracked commitments loops between Nvidia, the labs and the clouds across six edges. When Microsoft funds OpenAI, OpenAI buys Azure compute, and the clouds buy Nvidia chips, the same dollars are counted as 'AI revenue' at multiple stops. That inflates apparent end-demand: a chunk of the $56.5B AI-only revenue is recycled capital, not independent customers paying for AI output. The honest read is that genuine external demand is smaller than the headline, and the loop tightens fast if any node — most likely a frontier lab's funding — stalls.
circularity_read.zh: 約4240億美元的追蹤承諾在Nvidia、實驗室與雲端之間透過六條邊循環。當微軟投資OpenAI、OpenAI購買Azure算力、雲端再買Nvidia晶片，同一筆錢在多個節點被計為「AI營收」。這誇大了表面終端需求：565億純AI營收中有一部分是循環資本，而非獨立客戶為AI產出付費。誠實的解讀是真實外部需求小於標題數字，且只要任一節點（最可能是前沿實驗室的募資）卡住，這個迴圈會迅速收緊。

company_takes.en: INVESTING, heaviest builder. Coverage 0.182 with capex intensity 26% and capex growing ~107%/yr vs revenue ~22%. Cloud +30% is the fastest top-line growth in the group, but the depreciation bill arrives before the AI revenue does.
company_takes.zh: 投資中，建設最重。覆蓋率0.182，資本強度26%，資本支出年增約107%對營收約22%。雲端+30%是同業最快增速，但折舊帳單會比AI營收先到。

company_takes.en: INVESTING. Coverage 0.283 — tied best among hyperscalers — on cloud +22% and intensity 30.5%. Azure-OpenAI tie gives real monetization but also the deepest circularity exposure if the lab stumbles.
company_takes.zh: 投資中。覆蓋率0.283，與同業並列最佳，雲端+22%、資本強度30.5%。Azure與OpenAI綁定帶來真實變現，但若實驗室出問題，循環曝險也最深。

company_takes.en: INVESTING, lowest coverage 0.168 with the biggest absolute capex ($151B). Lower intensity (20.3%) cushions margins, but cloud +19% is the slowest of the group — monetization is lagging the build.
company_takes.zh: 投資中，覆蓋率最低0.168，絕對資本支出最大（1510億）。較低強度（20.3%）緩衝利潤，但雲端+19%為同業最慢——變現落後於建設。

company_takes.en: MONETIZING, fastest converter (score 61.9). Coverage 0.283 but the verdict reflects AI feeding ad revenue directly, not rented compute. Highest intensity (35.2%) is the risk — payoff must keep pace.
company_takes.zh: 變現中，轉換最快（評分61.9）。覆蓋率0.283，但判定反映AI直接餵養廣告營收而非租用算力。最高強度（35.2%）是風險——回報必須跟上。

company_takes.en: INVESTING. Rev $20B vs burn $35B, coverage 0.571 — best in cohort — but runway only 1.7y. Strongest revenue but a node where circularity concentrates; a funding miss tightens the whole loop.
company_takes.zh: 投資中。營收200億對燒錢350億，覆蓋率0.571為同類最佳，但跑道僅1.7年。營收最強，卻是循環集中的節點；募資失手會收緊整個迴圈。

company_takes.en: INVESTING. Rev $12B vs burn $18B, coverage 0.667 — highest of all six — and 1.7y runway. Smaller and more capital-efficient per dollar, but equally dependent on continued mega-rounds.
company_takes.zh: 投資中。營收120億對燒錢180億，覆蓋率0.667為六家最高，跑道1.7年。規模較小、每元資本效率較高，但同樣依賴持續的大額募資。

leading_signals.en: Cloud RPO/backlog (remaining performance obligations) — Azure/GCP/AWS commitments book before revenue recognizes.
leading_signals.zh: 雲端RPO／在手訂單——Azure／GCP／AWS的承諾在營收認列前先入帳。

leading_signals.en: Forward capex guidance and intensity changes on earnings calls — flat/down guidance signals digestion.
leading_signals.zh: 財報電話會的前瞻資本支出指引與強度變化——持平或下調預示消化期。

leading_signals.en: Server/GPU useful-life and depreciation schedule revisions — extending life flatters near-term margins.
leading_signals.zh: 伺服器／GPU使用年限與折舊表修訂——延長年限會美化近期利潤。

leading_signals.en: Frontier-lab funding rounds and valuations (OpenAI, Anthropic) — set the pace of the compute loop.
leading_signals.zh: 前沿實驗室募資輪與估值（OpenAI、Anthropic）——決定算力迴圈的節奏。

leading_signals.en: Multi-year compute-commitment announcements (lab↔cloud↔Nvidia) — expand or contract the circular total.
leading_signals.zh: 多年期算力承諾公告（實驗室↔雲端↔Nvidia）——擴張或收縮循環總額。

scenarios.trigger_en: Capex keeps rising roughly with revenue; aggregate coverage stuck at 0.2–0.3 for 3+ more quarters.
scenarios.trigger_zh: 資本支出大致隨營收上升；整體覆蓋率連續3季以上卡在0.2–0.3。

scenarios.trigger_en: Cloud growth re-accelerates AND AI-only run-rate doubles toward ~$110B while capex growth flattens — coverage climbs toward 0.5.
scenarios.trigger_zh: 雲端增速回升且純AI營收翻倍至約1100億、資本支出增速趨平——覆蓋率升向0.5。

scenarios.trigger_en: One or more hyperscalers guides capex flat/down YoY as utilization questions surface.
scenarios.trigger_zh: 一家以上雲端巨頭因利用率疑慮，將資本支出指引下調至年增持平或下滑。

scenarios.trigger_en: A frontier lab misses a funding round or revenue target; tracked commitments contract >$50B as deals renegotiate.
scenarios.trigger_zh: 前沿實驗室募資或營收目標未達；追蹤承諾隨協議重談收縮逾500億美元。

falsification.en: Aggregate AI-only revenue doubles to ~$110B while AI capex stays flat — coverage clears 0.4 and the BURNING verdict flips to INVESTING-paying-off.
falsification.zh: 整體純AI營收翻倍至約1100億而AI資本支出持平——覆蓋率突破0.4，BURNING判定翻轉為投資見效。

falsification.en: Cloud growth decelerates below 10% across all four while capex keeps rising — confirms over-build, deepens the burn beyond investment-phase framing.
falsification.zh: 四家雲端增速全跌破10%而資本支出續升——確認過度建設，燒錢超出投資期框架。

falsification.en: Circular commitments are shown to fund <10% of AI revenue, proving demand is genuine external — softens the circularity caveat materially.
falsification.zh: 循環承諾被證實僅支撐不到10%的AI營收，證明需求為真實外部——大幅弱化循環疑慮。

watch.zh: 前沿實驗室募資新聞與估值（OpenAI／Anthropic）。

watch.en: New compute-commitment / mega-deal announcements affecting the circular total.
watch.zh: 影響循環總額的新算力承諾／大型交易公告。

watch.en: Cloud RPO/backlog disclosures for Azure, GCP, AWS.
Forward capex guidance and capex intensity per company.
watch.zh: 各公司前瞻資本支出指引與資本強度。

watch.en: AI-only revenue run-rate updates and cloud segment growth.
watch.zh: 純AI營收運行率更新與雲端分部增速。
私營實驗室燒錢與跑道估計（目前約1.7年）。

blind_spots_en: 'AI capex' is an estimate: companies report TOTAL capex, not an AI line. The AI share is management-guided, not audited.
'AI revenue' is mostly un-isolable: cloud segment revenue is the hard floor; the AI-only band is OUR_EST. Meta's band is intentionally wide (AI monetizes via ad efficiency, not a product line).
Private-lab figures (OpenAI/Anthropic) are fragmentary press/our-estimates with no filings — directional only, not comparable to the audited hyperscalers.
Capex turns into depreciation over years; a low coverage today understates eventual return if utilization rises — but also hides margin pressure as the D&A tail lands.
Circular financing means some 'revenue' is the same dollars looping between Nvidia, the labs and the clouds — gross figures overstate independent end-demand.
blind_spots_zh: 「AI capex」是估計值:公司揭露的是「總」capex,沒有 AI 科目。AI 佔比為管理層口徑,未經審計。
「AI 營收」多半無法隔離:雲端分部營收是硬底;AI-only 帶為本平台估計。Meta 的帶刻意拉寬(AI 透過廣告效率變現,非產品線)。
私有實驗室數字(OpenAI/Anthropic)為零碎新聞/本平台估計,無財報 — 僅供方向,不可與受審計的巨頭直接相比。
capex 會在數年內轉為折舊;今日的低覆蓋率若使用率上升會低估最終回報 — 但也掩蓋了 D&A 尾巴落地時的毛利壓力。
循環融資意味部分「營收」是同一批資金在 Nvidia、實驗室與雲端之間轉圈 — 毛額會高估獨立的終端需求。
